descriptionShort: Dave Tomlinson signs one-year contract with German Elite League's Mannheim after two seasons as Cincinnati Cyclones' leading scorer.
descriptionLong: Cincinnati Cyclones center Dave Tomlinson, the team's leading scorer for two seasons, signed a one-year contract with Mannheim of Germany's Elite League on June 15, 1996. The deal more than doubles his previous Cyclones salary of under $100,000. Tomlinson sought compensation in the top three of the league but accepted Mannheim's offer after contract extension negotiations with Cincinnati failed.

attribution.headline: Cyclones center Tomlinson signs with German team
